patch.value: CONTEXT: choosing between @lancedb native bindings and a self-contained local store. DECISION: serialize vectors to a pure-JSON snapshot with atomic rename + in-process cosine similarity and an mtime/size-keyed in-memory cache. CONSEQUENCES: zero native deps, runs everywhere, inspectable+gitignorable; O(n) brute-force similarity acceptable at current scale but degrades on very large corpora (ANN path needs bundling pm-ss1d); snapshot compaction already applied (pm-f58e 33MB->19MB). EVIDENCE: src/core/search/vector-stores.ts; items pm-kj4/pm-f58e.
ADR: LanceDB pure-JSON snapshot vector store (no native bindings)
LanceDB pure-JSON snapshot vector store (no native bindings)
